caption: The video features Bola Tinubu, a prominent Nigerian political figure, speaking into a microphone during what appears to be a formal event or press conference. He is dressed in traditional attire, including a patterned hat and a beige outfit, which suggests a cultural or ceremonial context. The background includes a red curtain and some blurred elements, indicating an indoor setting, possibly a stage or a conference room. The text overlay on the screen reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME - BOLA TINUBU," emphasizing his statement and the political nature of the content. The PlusTV Africa logo and social media prompts suggest that this is a news segment or a broadcast aimed at a wide audience interested in Nigerian politics.
